trad1: Armed  with  the  seeing  of  the  narrow  wasps
trad2: Armed with the eyesight of narrow wasps
trad3: Armed with the eyesight of slender wasps,

trad1: that  suck  the  axis  of  the  earth,  the  axis  of  the  earth
trad2: That suck at the axis of the earth,
trad3: sucking at the earth's axis, the earth's axis,

Verso Ruso (Original): Я чую всё, с чем свидеться пришлось,
trad1: I  still  can  feel  that  which  I  had  to  meet
trad2: I smell everything that's come my way,
trad3: I feel everything that ever happened to me

trad1: and  can  remember  it  by  heart  and  vainly.
trad3: and I memorise it, but it's all in vain.

Verso Ruso (Original): И не рисую я, и не пою,
trad1: I  do  not  paint  and  do  not  sing
trad3: I don't draw and I don't sing,

trad1: and  do  not  draw  the  black-voiced  bow  across  the  strings:
trad2: Nor scrape a black-voiced bow across a string:
trad3: and I don't play the violin with a black-voiced bow.

Verso Ruso (Original): Я только в жизнь впиваюсь и люблю
trad1: I  only  sink  my  sting  in  life,  and  love
trad2: I only sting life, and love
trad3: I drive my sting only into life, and love

trad1: to  envy  the  powerful  cunning  wasps.
trad2: To envy the energy of subtle wasps.
trad3: to envy the powerful, cunning wasps.

Verso Ruso (Original): О, если б и меня когда-нибудь могло
trad2: Ob if only heat of summer, sting of air,
trad3: Oh, if I could be compelled

trad1: of  air  and  summer  warmth  could  make  me
trad3: by the sting of the air and the summer warmth

trad2: Some day goad me into hearing
trad3: to pass through the worlds of dreams and death,

trad1: hear  the  axis  of  the  earth,  the  axis  of  the  earth…
trad2: The buzz of earth, buzz of the earth.
trad3: to sense the earth's axis, the earth's axis…
